title: Gate-state: inherited tree soft-only for Thermal curation
body: Gate-state before claim: practice:fitness:informational exits 0 with SOFT (20 soft, 21 healthy), hard 0, critical 0. Active commit queue is empty; active claims are stale Feathered/Torrid implementation claims outside this docs-memory boundary. This pass will only touch soft drainable-buffer curation surfaces and permanent pattern homes if the candidate evidence proves a graduation.
